title: dactylus spicatus
intro: Dactylus spicatus, also known as Mediterranean barley or spiky barley, is a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dactylus spicatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Dactylus spicatus can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
